cases.name: silent-losses
cases.summary: Unsupported native concepts are dropped without a degraded-export report.

cases.name: split-export-without-roundtrip
cases.summary: Split layout files are emitted, but conformance and foreign-key preservation are incomplete.

cases.name: gold-export-loss-report
cases.summary: Exporter emits split files, loss reports, and round-trip conformance evidence.
